quotes.text: The best indie hackers are the ones who build things they personally use. They're their own best customer.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to understand your users is to be confused by your own product for 5 minutes. Then fix everything that confused you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best indie projects are the ones you'd use even if nobody else did.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to understand user needs is to be your own user for a week. You'll discover things no survey would tell you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie business should be something you'd use even if nobody else did. Build for yourself first.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to understand your customer is to become your customer. Use your own product.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first indie product should solve YOUR problem. Not what you think others' problems are.
quotes.author: based
